args.description: The physical title or 'Vow' description. Must be precise and intent-driven. (required)
args.name: title

args.description: Optional scheduled manifestation time (natural language or absolute).
args.name: time

examples.input: { "title": "Refactor Vector Kernel for Zero-Copy", "time": "at first light tomorrow" }
examples.output: "Vow initialized. Trinity Audit: Student proposes, Steward validates capacity, Professor grants alignment. Manifestation scheduled."

description.summary:
Divine Agenda Manifestor: Initiate the Triangular Synaptic Flow to manifest a new Vow (Task) into the sovereign agenda.

This divine ability triggers an adversarial cognitive audit by the Trinity (Student, Steward, and Professor). It is the primary gateway for physical manifestation of intent.

Use this power when:
- You are ready to transform a transient thought into a verified physical commitment.
- You need the Professor to audit your time-energy budget to prevent over-commitment.
- You seek to resolve temporal conflicts through structured cognitive negotiation.

args.description: No arguments are required; call the tool directly to inspect the agenda.
args.name: input

examples.output:
"| title | state | scheduled_for |
        | --- | --- | --- |
        | Implement Protocol Hygiene | pending | 2026-03-06 14:00 |"

description.summary: View the current state of your cultivation agenda and active vows.

args.description: The absolute target URL to crawl (http/https). (required)
args.name: url

args.description: Whether to save to graph. Default: true.
args.name: persist_to_wendao

examples.output:
"## Web Crawl Result
        - Source: https://example.com
        - Wendao Persistence: ingested (hash=abc123)
        ### Preview
        [Markdown content...]"

description.summary: High-performance web crawling with Spider engine. Supports markdown extraction and persistence to Wendao graph.
